feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to add a filter to an "overview page" fiori application ?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

My customer, running a SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition system, would like to add a filter to fiori application "Quality Engineer Overview" (F2360, which is a "SAP Fiori elements: Overview Page" kind of fiori application). The new filter to add should correspond to the Material's group:

Would this be possible please?

I tried checking but: 

- not possible to do anything with the UI adaptation mode other than changing the cards themselves (hide some or change of their attributes)

- SAP Fiori library says that Fiori app F2360 can be modified with "sap ui5 adaptation project" but would this fulfill my requirement?

Thank you all for your help

entry.title: Hide Currency Codes in Custom Analytical Queries
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I created Custom Analytical Queries from the Custom CDS view.
I created a query to view the Billing Value for a Service Contract in a list. In this case,
I want to view the list without displaying the currency code (JPY) of the Billing Value.

Please let me know how this can be achieved.

Soma

entry.title: Custom Field value is not picked up by SAP21 Customer Invoice Form
entry.content:
I'm doing implementation in S/4 Public Cloud Edition.

I've created a custom field in business context 'FINS_JOURNAL_ENTRY_ITEM' and implemented custom logic 'FIN_ACDOC_EXT_CHG_SUBSTITUTION' to populate the said custom field. I've had enabled the usage of the custom field to the custom form template.

Though custom field is recognized by form template and has been bound in a form field, value is not picked up when doing a form preview in Create Correspondence App.

Any steps I missed on why this is happening?

entry.title: How to create custom form template (output management) based on custom bo in s4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to create new custom business object and custom form template (output management) based on that custom business object in s4hana cloud system.

And as I checked, key user extensibility cannot fulfill that requirement.

(or) do I miss something while I checking and is it possible to create output management using key user extensibility?

If not, how can I create that kind of custom business object and custom form template (output management) easily.

If you have any documentation about it, could you please share with me?

Best Regards.

entry.title: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi Exparts,

I would like to lock a custom table at any time, so I am trying to control it using a lock object, but it is not working.
The technical background is that this is development on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, so it falls under Developer Extensibility.
Could you give me some advice, such as what to check?

I used the following documents as reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/06d03eda843643b7a64acfb67edf521b.html?locale=en-US

Best Regards,
Megumi Inoue

entry.title: Custom Field is not visible in Manage Journal Entries despite published status
entry.content:
In the custom fields app we have created and published a field in relation to the business context "Accounting: Coding Block".

When checking this field in apps such as Manage Journal Entries I could not add the field to the available items of the Journal Entry.

It appears the custom field has not been published correctly?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integrate Custom App Into SAP Fiori Launchpad Issue
entry.content:
Hi all,
I´m trying to publish the ABAP RAP created but when I perform the step to publish the app to the page/space created into S4HC public cloud I´m not able to see it:

It says "Please check if the spaces are assigned to a role with catalogs" but it is already assigned:

The IAM app was created, the custom business catalog has the IAM app assigned to it, the custom business role has the custom business catalog assigned to it but when I try to browse the BC into App Finder I can´t see it.

The BC was created and published because I can see it using Maintain Business Catalog app and I can see it from Eclipse IDE too.

Any tips please?
Links I have used:
Integrate List Report Into SAP Fiori Launchpad | SAP Tutorials
Develop an SAP Fiori Application UI | SAP Help Portal
Add Your App to SAP Fiori Launchpad | SAP Help Portal

Thanks in advance,
Mauricio Predolim

entry.title: Unable to share flavor of UI adaptation in S/4HANA Public Cloud system.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are experiencing an issue with sharing a flavor in the UI adaptation function in our SAP public Cloud system.

When we try to release the flavor, we are asked to select an assignment category but we are unable to find any.

 

Could you help us with resolving this issue?

 

Best Regards,

Fujita

\

entry.title: Clean core extensibility: what are "types of scope for software (Delivered, Required, Specific)"
entry.content:
In the quiz of the unit "Getting Started with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Extensions, and Clean Core" of the SAP Tutorial "Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud", there is this question and solution:

Question:

Which of the following are different types of scope that exist for software? (There are three correct answers. Among: Delivered, Overlapping, Required, Specific)

Solution:

The different types of scope that exist for software are Delivered, Required, and Specific.

What does it mean? Is it a screen field? Of which application? What is the lesson corresponding to this question? Do you have any documentation link about it?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: how to query and update standard Purchase Order from custom business object logic in S4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to create a custom BO by key-user (in-app) extensibility in S4hana cloud.

And I would like to query the standard Purchase Order data and, show that data in custom BO by clicking a button.

And if user update something in custom BO and click "Save" button, I would like to update these updated data in standard Purchase Order application again.

Is it possible to do in custom BO logic that is created by key-user (in-app) extensibility?

How can I develop?

Could you please provide sample logic about this?

Thank You.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Is it possible to use Maintain Standard Text app in Public cloud to determine Dynamic text in Forms
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to have certain texts like in So10 and to use those texts in a output form where the texts can also be altered in the future.

Is it possible to add texts in Maintain standard text app in SAP Public cloud and use them as dynamic texts in Adobe forms doe. will we be able to access these texts as a part of any CDS view or is there any BADI for the same? Kindly help if any alternative approach for this.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: SAP S4hana cloud public edition - collate printing
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for a way to print multiple copies of a delivery note which has more than 1 page with a different page order.

Currently it's printed in the order: 1,2,3 .. 1,2,3 .. etc.

But I want it to be printed in the order: 1,1 .. 2,2 .. 3,3 .. etc.

I know this way of printing can be used in for instance MS Word, by unchecking the "collate" option on the print dialog.

Is there a way to do this in SAP S4hana public cloud edition

entry.title: DATA migration
entry.content: data migration message number:PMD_MSG 061 物料类型 FERT 不允许节点 Product Plant Procurement 的维护状态 E

entry.title: Can we control Custom Logic code using Sy-Tcode or App name ?
entry.content:
Can we control Custom Logic code using Sy-Tcode or App name in S4HANA Public Cloud 2SL.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Configure username and password for a SAP PI/PO integration
entry.content:
I have an Integration that was publicly exposed and was carried out in the SAP PI/PO Integration Builder. For the security of this, I need to configure username and password for the SAP PI/PO Integration, it needs to request this data every time someone tries to consume it.

Thanks for the valuable help.

entry.title: SD_BILL_DATA_TRANSFER Badi Implementation is not working
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am have implemented the following badi "SD_BILL_DATA_TRANSFER" in order to convert the quantity of material/line item from TON to KG . I have tried passing the data into custom field which I have created to show the quantity conversion value but the issue is the converted value is not visible when I test or check in "display billing documents " or "change billing documents" app in sap public cloud.

Please suggest me a solution so that I can fulfill the requirement . I have used the following code to convert the value from ton to KG, I have used "907.185" value for conversion. My code is working in test mode but its not showing data at actual app. Your feedback would be highly valuable. 

Also, please suggest if I am using correct Badi or do I have to use another one to achieve the requirement ?

thanks,

Rajvardhan Patil

entry.title: Is there a way to know if current system is Production System, in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

For one of my developments in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, I need to build some logic depending if the current system is Production System or not.

In On-Premise systems I used to use table T000 or class CL_ABAP_SYST to do so, but I cannot use them in Cloud Public since they are not released for Cloud Development (Contract C1).

Does anyone know if there's another way to get such information? I took a look at all classes released for cloud, including the XCO libraries, but couldn't find anything suitable.

Thanks.

entry.title: Check used capacity of every custom field
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

firstly, I would like to ask about the capacity that particular custom field use. I know, that business context has certain capacity and that by creating a custom field in it, it will consume some capacity, but I would like to know the exact percentage of the capacity that every custom field takes.
Is it possible to check it somewhere? In the app Extensibility cockpit I can see only the percentage of used capacity, but that is it, and it is not enough for us. 

My second question is about lowering the number of characters of custom field. 
From my experience it is not possible, as there will be error message saying that I cannot decrease the value. BUT, is there any other way how to do it instead of deleting the field and creating the new one? From my understanding deleting the field that is already used will also delete data inside, which can be dangerous in production. 

Thank you very much for your help. 
Veronika

entry.title: Sending data in excel file from SAP to a shared folder of Virtual machine
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement where I need to send the data in excel to a shared folder of virtual machine and  RFC Connection to external system is also established but I’m unable to send the excel to that folder of virtual machine.

please help me if you have any solution for this. Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,                                                                  Naik

entry.title: How to query from custom bo using api with custom logic ABAP in key user extensibility?
entry.content:
Customer want to update field in custom business object. So we need to retrieve that field to update.

How to query from custom business object using api with custom logic ABAP in key user extensibility?
